mapper.insert: INSERT INTO incomes (id, tour_id, amount, type, note, received_at, created_at) VALUES ( #{id, typeHandler=com.lvying.mybatis.handler.UuidCharTypeHandler}, #{tourId, typeHandler=com.lvying.mybatis.handler.UuidCharTypeHandler}, #{amount}, #{type, typeHandler=org.apache.ibatis.type.EnumTypeHandler}, #{note}, #{receivedAt}, #{createdAt} )
mapper.select: SELECT COALESCE(SUM(amount), 0) FROM incomes WHERE tour_id = #{tourId, typeHandler=com.lvying.mybatis.handler.UuidCharTypeHandler}
